overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist exploring a scenic canyon river environment during golden hour. The character walks along rocky shores, swims through the river, and discovers mechanical wreckage in a darker section of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit canyon riverbank with layered rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the riverbank path beside the water

entered.detail: tall stratified rock formation with horizontal sedimentary layers
calm reflective water running through the canyon
massive rounded rock beside the path
distant pointed rock formations on the horizon
tall reddish-brown grass growing on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit canyon riverbank with layered rock formations on the left and a large boulder on the right. Tall red grass patches line the path as warm golden hour sunlight creates long shadows and lens flares across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river with clear water and rocky bottom

events.description: character steps from shore into the river water
character begins swimming through the deeper section of the river

agents.ego_description: wading into the river and swimming through the canyon water

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom and reflections

segments.scene_description: The character enters the clear river water and swims through the canyon channel. Sunlight reflects off the water surface as the character moves away from the grassy bank toward the opposite shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon shore with scattered dry bushes

events.description: character climbs out of the water onto the rocky bank

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the river and continuing along the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: dry rocky terrain with sparse vegetation and cracks
steep layered rock face on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the river onto a rocky shore and continues walking along the canyon edge. The terrain becomes more rugged with steep canyon walls on the right as the character approaches a darker section of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: shadowed canyon pool with ancient mechanical wreckage

events.description: scene transitions from bright sunlight to dark shadowy canyon area
character approaches large mechanical wreckage submerged in the water

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the mechanical debris in the shadowed water

entered.detail: large broken mechanical creature or structure partially submerged in the pool with glowing elements
tall dark rock walls enclosing the shadowed area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, shadowed section of the canyon and approaches a large mechanical wreckage partially submerged in the water. The lighting shifts dramatically to a darker tone as the character explores the area around the debris, walking along the rocky edge of the pool.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched riverbank into the deep, shadowed recesses of a canyon. It begins with the character walking through tall red grass and layered rock formations, where warm golden hour sunlight creates long shadows and lens flares. As the character leaves the bank, the scene shifts to a swim through the clear river water, with sunlight reflecting off the surface while moving toward the opposite shore. The camera then follows the character as they exit the water onto a rugged rocky shore, moving along steep canyon walls as the environment gradually grows dimmer. Finally, the lighting shifts dramatically to a dark tone as the character enters a shadowed section of the canyon to approach a large piece of mechanical wreckage partially submerged in a pool.
